summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Speakupp website content updates. All major features and new content verified successfully including new hero text, updated photos, stats, and navigation functionality.
passed_tests: Hero section displays new headline: 'Confidence Isn't Something You Chase — It's Something You Uncover'
Hero image shows correct photo (black dress on steps) from a.JPEG
Updated stats display correctly: 800+ Events Worldwide, 10+ Years Experience, 1000+ Lives Transformed
About section shows 10 years experience and 800+ events worldwide text
About section image shows sparkly outfit photo from h.jpeg
Classes section title displays 'This Is Not Passive Learning'
All navigation links (Home, About, Classes, Schedule, Pricing, Contact) work correctly
Gallery images in classes section display correctly (3 images found)
Video section with introduction video container loads properly
Schedule section displays 4 schedule cards with join button
Pricing section displays both Student and Regular plan cards
Contact form with all input fields (name, email, message) and submit button functional
Contact information links (phone, email) work correctly
Social media links (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube) are present and functional
Mobile menu functionality works on mobile viewport
CTA buttons (primary and secondary) are visible and clickable
Website is responsive across desktop and mobile viewports
